subject: New Opening: Microservices Engineer – Java – Fintech
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Kredify (fintech) is looking for a mid Microservices Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: 2022-12-14
• Duration: 12 months
• Location: Malmö (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 775 SEK/h

Required tech:
• Java
• GCP
• Kubernetes
• Oracle

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Oscar Lindgren
Senior Consultant Manager
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 73 233 45 67
